_note: ETSI TS 119 602 Annex E — List of Wallet Providers. teTradeName carries the EN 319 412-1 registration identifier; the service digital identity is the WP CA that wallet-unit artifacts (WUAs) chain to.
title: Wallet Providers
description: Trusted wallet solution providers. Wallet-unit attestations (WUAs) chain to the certificate on this list.
schemeName: Hopae EUDI Sandbox — List of Wallet Providers
